imageHints.suggestedSubject: website screenshot, app screen, device mockup, or product thumbnail
imageHints.treatment: image serves as visual proof of the thing being announced

useCases: Website or app launch announcement posts
Digital product drop posts (template, course, tool)
Rebrand or redesign reveal posts showing the new design
avoidCases: Pre-launch teasers where you don't want to show the product yet (use coming-soon-minimal)
Physical product launches without a screen or digital element
When the image is low-resolution or a wireframe
